name: Shieldbearer
ability: While you are alive, Outsiders do not trigger their death effects when dying at night.

name: Baroness
ability: While you are alive, executed players do not trigger Outsider death effects.

firstNightReminder: Each night, you learn 1 Minion or Outsider character that is not in play.
otherNightReminder: Each night, you learn 1 Minion or Outsider character that is not in play.
name: Lookout
ability: Each night, you learn 1 Minion or Outsider character that is not in play.

firstNightReminder: Each night, you learn how many alive players are no longer their original character.
otherNightReminder: Each night, you learn how many alive players are no longer their original character.
name: Chaplain
ability: Each night, you learn how many alive players are no longer their original character.

firstNightReminder: On your first night, you learn the sum of all Outsider & all Minion players' seats.
name: Scribe
ability: On your first night, you learn the sum of all Outsider & all Minion players' seats.

firstNightReminder: Each night, choose 3 other alive players: you learn if exactly one of them is a non-Demon evil player.
otherNightReminder: Each night, choose 3 other alive players: you learn if exactly one of them is a non-Demon evil player.
name: Inquisitor
ability: Each night, choose 3 other alive players: you learn if exactly one of them is a non-Demon evil player.

firstNightReminder: Each night, choose a player: you learn if either alive neighbor of that player is an Outsider.
otherNightReminder: Each night, choose a player: you learn if either alive neighbor of that player is an Outsider.
name: Patrolman
ability: Each night, choose a player: you learn if either alive neighbor of that player is an Outsider.

name: Quartermaster
ability: Each day, you may publicly choose a player: if they are a Minion or Outsider, they are drunk until next dawn.

otherNightReminder: If you die at night, choose an alive player: if they are a non-Demon evil player, they lose their ability and die.
name: Ranger
ability: If you die at night, choose an alive player: if they are a non-Demon evil player, they lose their ability and die.

name: Herald
ability: Each day, you may privately visit the Storyteller and name 3 players: you learn if exactly one of them is an Outsider.

name: Spy Hunter
ability: Each day, you may privately visit the Storyteller and name 2 players: the Storyteller tells you which is closer to a Minion.

firstNightReminder: Each night, choose a player: if they are dead, you learn if they are evil; if they are alive, you learn if they were woken tonight.
otherNightReminder: Each night, choose a player: if they are dead, you learn if they are evil; if they are alive, you learn if they were woken tonight.
name: Coroner
ability: Each night, choose a player: if they are dead, you learn if they are evil; if they are alive, you learn if they were woken tonight.

firstNightReminder: On your first night, you learn 2 Demon characters; one is in play. From day 3, during the day, you may privately ask the Storyteller: learn the Demon character.
name: Scout
ability: On your first night, you learn 2 Demon characters; one is in play. From day 3, during the day, you may privately ask the Storyteller: learn the Demon character.

name: Wounded
ability: When you die, that night the Demon must choose an alive player: they become a Puppet.
otherNightReminder: If the Wounded died tonight, the Demon must choose an alive player: they become a Puppet.

name: Deserter
ability: When you die, that night the Demon must choose an alive player: they die tonight.
otherNightReminder: If the Deserter died tonight, the Demon must choose an alive player: they die tonight.

name: Refugee
ability: When you die, that night the Demon must choose a good dead player: they turn evil. (Once only)
otherNightReminder: If the Refugee died tonight and the Refugee effect has not triggered before, the Demon must choose a good dead player: they turn evil.

name: Captive
ability: When you die, that night the Demon must choose an evil player and a Minion character: they become that character and immediately use that ability.
otherNightReminder: If the Captive died tonight, the Demon must choose an evil player and a Minion character: they become that character and immediately use that ability.

name: Puppet
ability: You think you are a good character, but you are not. When you die, that night the Demon must choose an Outsider character (different to last time): trigger that Outsider's death ability. [Does not appear during setup]
otherNightReminder: If a Puppet died tonight, the Demon must choose an Outsider character (different to last time): trigger that Outsider's death ability.

firstNightReminder: On your first night, choose an alive player: at the start of tomorrow's day, you both become a Puppet.
name: Mole
ability: On your first night, choose an alive player: at the start of tomorrow's day, you both become a Puppet.

firstNightReminder: Each night, choose an alive neighbor: they become a Puppet tonight and tomorrow day.
otherNightReminder: Each night, choose an alive neighbor: they become a Puppet tonight and tomorrow day.
name: Hexer
ability: Each night, choose an alive neighbor: they become a Puppet tonight and tomorrow day.

otherNightReminder: Each night*, you may choose a Demon character: choose to make yourself or the Demon become that character; the other becomes a Puppet.
name: Turncoat
ability: Each night*, you may choose a Demon character: choose to make yourself or the Demon become that character; the other becomes a Puppet. [+1 Outsider]

name: Undead
ability: You think you are an Outsider character, but you are not. You also register as an Outsider. If the Demon dies, you become that Demon. When you die, trigger a Puppet's death ability. The Demon and Minions know you are the Undead.

firstNightReminder: Each night, you see the Grimoire.
otherNightReminder: Each night, you see the Grimoire. Each night*, choose a player: they die.
name: Siege Lord
ability: Each night, you see the Grimoire. Each night*, choose a player: they die.

otherNightReminder: Each night*, choose a player: they die.
name: Vanguard
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. Outsiders also register as a Puppet. [+1 Outsider]

name: Shapeshifter
ability: Each night*, the Shapeshifters must jointly choose a player: they die. When you die, trigger a Puppet's death ability. You also register as an Outsider and a Minion. [During setup, Minions become Shapeshifters]
otherNightReminder: Each night*, the Shapeshifters must jointly choose a player: they die. When you die, trigger a Puppet's death ability.

firstNightReminder: On your first night, choose a player: they become a Puppet.
otherNightReminder: Each night*, choose a player: they die. If you kill the player you chose on your first night, you may swap characters with an evil player.
name: Shadow Archer
ability: On your first night, choose a player: they become a Puppet. Each night*, choose a player: they die. If you kill the player you chose on your first night, you may swap characters with an evil player.
